corpus_binding.interpretation: The accepted LSLC-001A roles remain public-documentation specifications with null oracle and candidate evidence. This overlay records only independently authored local Rust composition tests.

composition.relationship: XmlLeafElement::new infallibly moves exactly one accepted XmlElementName and one accepted XmlCharacterData without cloning, validation, representation, or interpretation policy.

candidate_policy.interpretation: The existing LSLC-001C global greater-than replacement remains local candidate policy and is not changed or promoted by composition.

does_not_prove: start-tag, end-tag, or empty-element spelling; attributes, children, mixed content, trees, roots, or documents
new name validation, character-data representation, namespace interpretation, parsing, decoding, serialization, raw-byte output, or canonicalization policy
LSL stream-info mapping, field order, omission rules, numeric or channel-format spelling, or exact endpoint bytes
official liblsl behavior, an oracle observation, candidate differential evidence, or compatibility
protocol, wire, discovery, transport, clock, inlet, outlet, runtime, adapter, provider, FFI, device, or Morphospace authority behavior
